28 #ifndef ROSCPP_INTERNAL_TIMER_MANAGER_H
29 #define ROSCPP_INTERNAL_TIMER_MANAGER_H
30 
31 #include "forwards.h"
32 #include <ros/time.h>
33 #include "common.h"
34 
35 namespace ros
36 {
37 
38 template<typename T, typename D, typename E> class TimerManager;
39 typedef TimerManager<SteadyTime, WallDuration, SteadyTimerEvent> InternalTimerManager;
40 typedef boost::shared_ptr<InternalTimerManager> InternalTimerManagerPtr;
41 
42 ROSCPP_DECL void initInternalTimerManager();
43 ROSCPP_DECL InternalTimerManagerPtr getInternalTimerManager();
44 
45 } // namespace ros
46 
47 #endif // ROSCPP_INTERNAL_TIMER_MANAGER_H
